watchlist.thesis_alignment: Early-stage digital health with real clinical robustness.
watchlist.notes: Digital-health research house and early-stage fund. Values robust clinical evidence: only ~20% of digital health carries real trials, and clinical claims are poorly correlated with evidence, so companies that rigorously demonstrate impact stand out. Tracks reimbursement and evidence pathways. Thesis that established distribution networks plus AI drive efficiency and scale.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: AI-enabled healthcare and bio, infrastructure to applications.
watchlist.notes: Backs AI-enabled healthcare and bio across infrastructure and the application layer; AI-native clinical workflows.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: AI-native healthcare services, outcomes over software.
watchlist.notes: Healthcare thesis follows its AI view: sell work outcomes, not software; values a proprietary data flywheel tied to a business metric and deep domain expertise.
Healthcare and biotech specialist. Backs companies with strong clinical evidence and a clear reimbursement path; contrarian, early-stage.

watchlist.thesis_alignment: Digital-health writer and commentator, not a primary check-writer.
watchlist.notes: Second Opinion. Digital-health market voice tracked for intelligence, not deal flow.
